thesis_summary: Bullish gap continuation remains actionable only if the open holds above premarket demand, reclaims early rotation, and stays above VWAP into late morning.

checks.label: Open holds above upper premarket demand
checks.rationale: A bullish gap should not accept back below the first defended demand shelf.

checks.label: Open is rotational or dip-then-reclaim, not liquidation
checks.rationale: The long thesis needs early selling to be absorbed rather than accepted.

checks.label: Price above VWAP by late morning
checks.rationale: A valid gap continuation should regain or hold VWAP before lunch.

checks.label: No acceptance below lower premarket demand
checks.rationale: Breaking 29120 would turn the setup from bullish pullback into gap-fade risk.

checks.label: Noon holds above 29300
checks.rationale: Prior lessons require a continuation check before carrying long bias through lunch.
